name: gyoretsu
pos: The yokai parade marches slowly forward, paper lanterns swing gently and flicker with warm light, the demons bob up and down as they walk, robes and sleeves sway, the white ghost drifts smoothly, lantern glow pulses softly on the street, lively eerie night procession, flat emaki painting style preserved, continuous smooth slow motion, highly detailed.

name: kawabe
pos: The pale blue foxfire flames flicker and sway slowly over the dark river, their reflections shimmer and ripple on the water surface, the small dark figures walk slowly across the wooden bridge in a line, reeds sway very gently, mysterious cold night atmosphere, flat emaki painting style preserved, continuous smooth slow motion, highly detailed.
